reason: The PyPI distribution name ctxvault is already owned by another project. The package lane is therefore moved to the distinct ctxgov identity before any registry publication is attempted.

pypi_account_state.impact: Official PyPI trusted-publisher setup and PyPI organization request cannot be completed until a PyPI account is created or recovered.

blocked_until_external_configuration: Create or recover a working account on https://pypi.org/.
Enable required PyPI account security controls, including verified email and two-factor authentication.
Request or configure the ctxgov PyPI organization if publishing under the organization identity.
Configure pending publisher for project ctxgov with owner ctxgov, repository ctxgov, workflow publish-python.yml, environment pypi.
Configure TestPyPI pending publisher for project ctxgov with owner ctxgov, repository ctxgov, workflow publish-python.yml, environment testpypi.
blocked_until_later_approval: Run TestPyPI trusted-publishing workflow for ctxgov.
Run PyPI trusted-publishing workflow for ctxgov.

rollback.source_rollback: Revert the ctxgov package-identity hardening commit before any registry publication if the package lane is abandoned.
